stimulus.name: Deploy Microsoft Copilot to Claims function

step8_human_system.narrative: Headcount reduction of 207 FTEs will create disruption. Readiness is likely to decline initially. Change burden is HIGH (100/100). Consider phased deployment to reduce resistance. Average readiness (45) is below the 50-point threshold. Readiness intervention recommended BEFORE deployment.

risks.description: 32 compliance-mandated tasks in scope. Automation must NOT touch these. Verify boundary enforcement.
11 high-proficiency skills are being sunset: manual report generation, routine document classification, manual data entry, manual data entry, manual report generation. Knowledge may be lost.
Change burden score is 100/100. Risk of change fatigue and resistance.
Headcount reduction of 38.3% may impact service quality. Remaining staff absorb more work.
All 207 FTE reductions concentrated in Claims. Political and operational risk.
